faqs.question: How much does carpenter ant control cost in Baychester?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ant control in Baychester typically ranges from $350 to $2,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, property size, and number of colonies present. A standard single-family home treatment usually costs $350-$700, while larger properties or severe infestations requiring multiple treatments and structural repairs may reach $2,000. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have carpenter ants in my Baychester home?
faqs.answer: Signs of carpenter ants include piles of wood shavings (frass) near baseboards or wooden structures, rustling sounds inside walls, and seeing large black ants especially during spring evenings. Baychester homes with wooden siding, decks, or mature trees nearby are particularly susceptible. If you notice winged ants indoors during spring, you likely have an established colony that requires professional treatment.

faqs.question: How quickly can you treat carpenter ants in Baychester?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Baychester and the Bronx for urgent carpenter ant problems. Most treatments are completed in 2-4 hours, with follow-up visits scheduled 2-3 weeks later to ensure complete colony elimination. Emergency services are available for severe infestations threatening structural integrity.

faqs.question: Are carpenter ant treatments safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and modern application methods that are safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed technicians. We can also provide pet-friendly and child-safe treatment options upon request. After treatment, we recommend keeping pets and children away from treated areas for 2-4 hours until surfaces are completely dry.
